message:
feat(abi): delegate updwtmp/updwtmpx, sigstack, login/logout/logwtmp to host libc via runtime dlsym

- Replace no-op stubs for updwtmp() and updwtmpx() with host libc
  delegation, forwarding write-accounting calls when the symbol exists
- Replace sigstack() success-stub with host delegation, setting errno
  to ENOSYS and returning -1 when the host symbol is unavailable
  (matching modern glibc deprecation behavior) instead of silently
  returning success
- Replace login()/logout()/logwtmp() stubs with host delegation,
  forwarding login-accounting calls when available
- Add logout_matches_host_missing_line_shape test comparing return
  code and errno against host libc for nonexistent utmp lines
- Add updwtmp_and_updwtmpx_match_host_file_effects test verifying
  delegation to host implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
